cards.title: Rain, Steam, and Speed
cards.creator: J. M. W. Turner
cards.notice: Turner shows railway travel as speed, weather, technology, and uncertainty crossing the landscape.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: The Lovely and the Liminal · Big ideas: Liminality / Journeys · Subjects: Visual and Performing Arts / History

cards.title: The Stanley Parable
cards.creator: Galactic Cafe / Crows Crows Crows
cards.movementContext: Narrative game about choices, endings, and loops
cards.notice: The Stanley Parable makes liminality interactive through looping offices, choice, narration, and routes that never fully settle.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: The Lovely and the Liminal · Big ideas: Liminality / Routes, Roads & Navigation · Subjects: Media / Film / Computer Science / Technology

cards.title: POOLS
cards.creator: Tensori
cards.notice: POOLS makes the in-between interactive through empty poolrooms, echoes, water, and architecture with no normal destination.
